completed: Chapter delivery now comes from generated server-only JSON over /api/chapters instead of import.meta.glob browser bundles.
Anonymous visitors receive preview chapter payloads while authenticated readers receive full chapter content and protected PDF downloads.
Homepage, membership, export, and social-template copy now describe free reader accounts rather than anonymous open access.
Verification completed with npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, local and live API smoke checks, and a live synthetic account registration.
next_task: Gate source-library and citation payloads behind the same authenticated policy and move search to a server-backed preview/full index split.
next_priorities: Remove full source-library and citation payloads from preview responses so anonymous readers cannot reconstruct gated chapters from supporting data.
Move search onto a server-backed index that serves preview text to anonymous readers and full-record search to signed-in accounts.
Connect HubSpot workflows, double opt-in, and lifecycle scoring in the portal.
Connect Google Search Console and verify production funnel events in GA4 plus HubSpot.
